description: Crafted from soft leather, this tan wallet from lee is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a textured finish, this bi-fold wallet has an embossed brand name on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. Dimensions: 12 cm x 9 cm Soft leather for flexibility and durability Two compartments with fabric inner lining on the inside Multiple partitions on the bi-fold to stash away cards A mesh flap for an id card or photograph Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
